achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.description: A proof of concept that turns Compet+ usage into a fun checklist for organizers.

toolbar.title: Two update modes
toolbar.description: Compet+ can feed this engine with domain events. FFTA Modules can resync by scanning the current Ianseo/Compet+ database. Same goal, two paths. Very organizer-friendly.

sections.checklistHelp: Milestones encourage using the full software instead of staying in the same three screens forever.
sections.scanHelp: Fast read-only scan based on available SDK data services.
sections.eventsHelp: Demo buttons emulate future Compet+ domain events. In Compet+, these would be emitted automatically.

events.empty: No event received yet. Click a demo event to unlock event-driven achievements.

competitionLoaded.title: Competition loaded
competitionLoaded.description: Open or detect an active competition. The adventure starts here.

entriesImported.title: First registrations
entriesImported.description: Have at least one archer in the competition. Empty tournaments are philosophically elegant, but not very lively.

bigCompetition100.title: 100+ archers
bigCompetition100.description: Run a competition with at least 100 archers. Now the coffee machine becomes infrastructure.

targetsAssigned.title: First target assignment
targetsAssigned.description: Assign at least one archer to a target. The field plan has officially met reality.

fieldPlanComplete.title: Complete field plan
fieldPlanComplete.description: Assign every registered archer to a target. Clean work, no loose arrow in the spreadsheet.

scoresEntered.title: First scores entered
scoresEntered.description: Record at least one qualification score. Results mode is awake.

rankingReady.title: Ranking ready
rankingReady.description: Have at least one ranked archer after score processing.

multiSession.title: Multi-session organizer
multiSession.description: Use at least two sessions in the competition. Welcome to real-world scheduling.

allDivisions.title: Three bow styles
allDivisions.description: Manage at least three divisions in the same competition. Classic, compound, barebow: the family photo.

exportFederal.title: Federal export generated
exportFederal.description: Generate a federation-compatible export. The paperwork dragon has been defeated.

pdfGenerated.title: PDF generated
pdfGenerated.description: Generate at least one PDF document from the software.

recordWitnessed.title: Record witnessed
recordWitnessed.description: Detect or validate a record broken during the competition. This deserves a tiny trumpet.

individualFinals.title: Individual finals launched
individualFinals.description: Use individual finals in a competition. The scoreboard starts to sweat.

teamFinals.title: Team finals launched
teamFinals.description: Use team finals or team group phases. Collective chaos, properly organized.

liveEnabled.title: Live enabled
liveEnabled.description: Publish or enable live competition data. Spectators enter the chat.

backupCreated.title: Safety first
backupCreated.description: Create a backup. Not glamorous, absolutely heroic.
